mapper.select: SELECT MAX(IFNO) FROM T_MM_WORKSUB_IF WHERE ifno LIKE '%${date}%'
SELECT MAX(IFNO) FROM T_MM_Work_Input_IF WHERE ifno LIKE '%${date}%'
SELECT MAX(IFNO) FROM T_ST_EXCEPTENTERSUB_IF WHERE ifno LIKE '%${date}%'
SELECT MAX(IFNO) FROM T_ST_ExceptDeliverysub_IF WHERE ifno LIKE '%${date}%'
SELECT MAX(IFNO) FROM T_ST_Movesub_IF WHERE ifno LIKE '%${date}%'
SELECT MAX(IFNO) FROM T_MM_DELIVERYBACKSUB_IF WHERE ifno LIKE '%${date}%'
SELECT MAX(IFNO) FROM T_PM_ENTERbackSUB_IF WHERE ifno LIKE '%${date}%'
SELECT MAX(IFNO) FROM T_MM_OUTREQUESTSUB_IF WHERE ifno LIKE '%${date}%'
SELECT MAX(IFNO) FROM T_ST_Movesub_IF WHERE ifno LIKE '%${date}%'
SELECT MAX(IFNO) FROM T_PM_NON_ARRIVALSUB_IF WHERE ifno LIKE '%${date}%'
mapper.update: update T_WMS_SEMIWORK set intf_yn = 'N', ifno = '', mes_key = '', mes_seq = '', wms_seq = '', wms_seq1 = '', intf_ymdhms = '', intf_ymdhms_d = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') where mes_key = #{meskey} and barcode = #{barcode} and sdate = #{sdate}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_QC_BUYREQUESTSUB_IF ( IFNO, GUBUN, BRANCH, CONDATE, BRNO, BRSUBNO, ITEMCODE, MANCODE, CUSTCODE, PONO, POSUBNO, POQTY, PENO, PESUBNO, QTY, UNITPRICE, ERP_TRANSFER_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_REMARK, REMARK, INSUSER, INSDATE, UPDUSER, UPDDATE, CUD_DIV, DATA_DIV, MES_KEY, MES_SEQ, DELETE_GUBUN,ROOMCODE ) VALUES ( #{ifno}, '01', '000', #{condate}, ' ', ' ', #{itemcode}, 'ZZ99', #{custcode}, ' ', ' ', 0, ' ', ' ', #{qty}, '757', 'N', 'N', ' ', ' ', 'SCMPDA', TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MI'), ' ', ' ', #{cuddiv}, 'SCM', #{meskey}, 1, ' ', #{roomcode} )

INSERT INTO T_PM_ENTERSUB_IF ( IFNO, GUBUN, BRANCH, CONDATE, PENO, PESUBNO, ITEMCODE, MANCODE, CUSTCODE, ROOMCODE, LOTNO, POQTY, KIQTY, UNITPRICE, AMOUNT, QTY, PONO, POSUBNO, REMARK, VATAMT, CMB_REASON, ERP_TRANSFER_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_REMARK, INSUSER, INSDATE, UPDUSER, UPDDATE, CUD_DIV, DATA_DIV, MES_KEY, DELETE_GUBUN, MES_SEQ, GMONEY, GENTER ) VALUES ( #{ifno}, '01', '000', #{condate}, ' ', ' ', #{itemcode}, 'ZZ99', #{custcode}, #{roomcode}, ' ', 0, 0, '999', 0, #{qty}, ' ', ' ', ' ', 0, ' ', 'N', 'N', ' ', 'SCMPDA', TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MI'), ' ', ' ', #{cuddiv}, 'SCM', #{meskey}, ' ', 1, '002', '001' )

INSERT INTO T_PM_ENTERSUB_IF ( IFNO, GUBUN, BRANCH, CONDATE, PENO, PESUBNO, ITEMCODE, MANCODE, CUSTCODE, ROOMCODE, LOTNO, POQTY, KIQTY, UNITPRICE, AMOUNT, QTY, PONO, POSUBNO, REMARK, VATAMT, CMB_REASON, ERP_TRANSFER_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_REMARK, INSUSER, INSDATE, UPDUSER, UPDDATE, CUD_DIV, DATA_DIV, MES_KEY, DELETE_GUBUN, MES_SEQ, GMONEY, GENTER ) VALUES ( #{ifno}, '01', '000', #{condate}, ' ', ' ', #{itemcode}, 'ZZ99', #{custcode}, #{roomcode}, ' ', 0, 0, '999', 0, #{qty}, ' ', ' ', ' ', 0, ' ', 'N', 'N', ' ', 'SCMPDA', TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MI'), ' ', ' ', #{cuddiv}, 'SCM', #{mes_key}, ' ', 1, '002', '001' )
INSERT INTO T_PM_ENTERSUB_IF ( IFNO,MES_KEY,MES_SEQ,DATA_DIV,CUD_DIV,DELETE_GUBUN,GUBUN ) VALUES ('DE' || SUBSTR(#{meskey}, 3),#{meskey},'1','SCM','D','A','01')
INSERT INTO T_QC_BUYREQUESTSUB_IF ( IFNO,MES_KEY,MES_SEQ,DATA_DIV,CUD_DIV,DELETE_GUBUN ) VALUES ('DE' || SUBSTR(#{meskey}, 3),#{meskey},'1','SCM','D','A')
INSERT INTO T_MM_WORKSUB_IF(IFNO,MES_KEY,MES_SEQ,DATA_DIV,CUD_DIV,DELETE_GUBUN) VALUES('DF' || SUBSTR(#{mes_key}, 3),#{mes_key},'1','SCM','D','A')
INSERT INTO T_MM_Work_Input_IF(IFNO,MES_KEY,MES_SEQ,DATA_DIV,CUD_DIV,DELETE_GUBUN) VALUES('DF' || SUBSTR(#{mes_key}, 3),#{mes_key},'1','SCM','D','A')
INSERT INTO T_MM_ENTERSUB_IF(IFNO,MES_KEY,MES_SEQ,DATA_DIV,CUD_DIV,DELETE_GUBUN) VALUES('DF' || SUBSTR(#{mes_key}, 3),#{mes_key},'1','SCM','D','A')

INSERT INTO T_QC_BUYREQUESTSUB_IF ( IFNO, GUBUN, BRANCH, CONDATE, BRNO, BRSUBNO, ITEMCODE, MANCODE, CUSTCODE, PONO, POSUBNO, POQTY, PENO, PESUBNO, QTY, UNITPRICE, ERP_TRANSFER_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_REMARK, REMARK, INSUSER, INSDATE, UPDUSER, UPDDATE, CUD_DIV, DATA_DIV, MES_KEY, MES_SEQ, DELETE_GUBUN,ROOMCODE ) VALUES ( #{ifno}, '01', '000', #{condate}, ' ', ' ', #{itemcode}, 'ZZ99', #{custcode}, ' ', ' ', 0, ' ', ' ', #{qty}, '757', 'N', 'N', ' ', ' ', 'SCMPDA', TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MI'), ' ', ' ', #{cuddiv}, 'SCM', #{mes_key}, 1, ' ', #{roomcode} )

INSERT INTO T_MM_OUTREQUESTSUB_IF ( IFNO, GUBUN, BRANCH, CONDATE, MRNO, MRSUBNO, CHILDCODE, MANCODE, ROOMCODE, WCCODE, OUTQTY, TREASON, TESTATE, REMARK, ERP_TRANSFER_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_REMARK, IFDATE, INSUSER, INSDATE, UPDUSER, UPDDATE, CUD_DIV, DATA_DIV, MES_KEY, DELETE_GUBUN, MES_SEQ, PENO, PESUBNO, EENO, EESUBNO ) VALUES ( #{ifno_if}, '01', '000', #{condate}, ' ', ' ', #{itemcode}, 'ZZ99', #{roomcode}, #{wccode}, to_number(#{qty}), '001', '001', ' ', 'N', 'N', ' ', ' ', 'ZZ99', TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MI'), ' ', ' ', 'I', 'SCM', #{mes_key}, ' ', '1', ' ', ' ', ' ', ' ' )

INSERT INTO T_MM_OUTREQUESTSUB_IF ( IFNO, GUBUN, BRANCH, CONDATE, MRNO, MRSUBNO, CHILDCODE, MANCODE, ROOMCODE, WCCODE, OUTQTY, TREASON, TESTATE, REMARK, ERP_TRANSFER_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_REMARK, IFDATE, INSUSER, INSDATE, UPDUSER, UPDDATE, CUD_DIV, DATA_DIV, MES_KEY, DELETE_GUBUN, MES_SEQ, PENO, PESUBNO, EENO, EESUBNO ) VALUES ( #{ifno_if}, '01', '000', #{condate}, ' ', ' ', #{itemcode}, 'ZZ99', #{roomcode}, #{wccode}, to_number(#{qty}), '001', '001', ' ', 'N', 'N', ' ', ' ', 'ZZ99', TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MI'), ' ', ' ', 'D', 'SCM', #{mes_key}, 'A', '1', ' ', ' ', ' ', ' ' )

INSERT INTO T_MM_WORKSUB_IF ( IFNO, GUBUN, BRANCH, CONDATE, MWNO, MWSUBNO, ITEMCODE, MANCODE, TWORK,
QTY, GQTY, BQTY, LOTNO, REMARK, MONO, MOSUBNO, MOSUBNO2, GINPUT,
MCCODE, WORKTEAM, GEND, WCCODE, MPSITEM, RTCODE, GTEST_1, GTEST_2, TOWCCODE, PCODE,
ERP_TRANSFER_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_REMARK, IFDATE, INSUSER, INSDATE, UPDUSER, UPDDATE, CUD_DIV, DATA_DIV,
MES_KEY, DELETE_GUBUN, MES_SEQ ) VALUES ( #{ifno_if}, '01', '000', #{condate}, ' ', ' ', #{itemcode}, 'ZZ99', '001',
#{qty}, #{qty}, 0, ' ', ' ', ' ', ' ', ' ', 1,
#{lineno}, '001', 1, #{wccode}, #{itemcode}, ' ', 1, 1, ' ', ' ',
'N', 'N', ' ', ' ', 'ZZ99', TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MI'), ' ', ' ', 'I', 'SCM',
#{mes_key}, ' ', 1 )
mapper.select: select childcode, qtyper from t_mi_mbomstr where itemcode = #{itemcode}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO T_MM_Work_Input_IF ( IFNO, GUBUN, BRANCH, CONDATE, MWNO, MWSUBNO, MWSUBNO2, ITEMCODE, MANCODE, TWORK, CHILDCODE,
QTYPER, LOSS, LOTNO, REMARK, RCGUBUN, INQTY, WCCODE, MPSITEM, QTY, PCODE, ERP_TRANSFER_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_REMARK, IFDATE, INSUSER,
INSDATE, UPDUSER, UPDDATE, CUD_DIV, DATA_DIV, MES_KEY, DELETE_GUBUN, MES_SEQ, MES_SEQ1
) VALUES ( #{ifno_real_if}, '01', '000', #{condate}, ' ', ' ', ' ', #{itemcode}, 'ZZ99', '001', #{childcode},
#{qtyper}, 0, ' ', ' ', 0, #{inqty}, #{wccode}, #{itemcode}, #{qty}, ' ', 'N', 'N', ' ', ' ', 'ZZ99',
TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MI'), ' ', ' ', 'I', 'SCM', #{mes_key}, ' ', 1, #{messeq} )

INSERT INTO T_MM_WORKSUB_IF ( IFNO, GUBUN, BRANCH, CONDATE, MWNO, MWSUBNO, ITEMCODE, MANCODE, TWORK,
QTY, GQTY, BQTY, LOTNO, REMARK, MONO, MOSUBNO, MOSUBNO2, GINPUT,
MCCODE, WORKTEAM, GEND, WCCODE, MPSITEM, RTCODE, GTEST_1, GTEST_2, TOWCCODE, PCODE,
ERP_TRANSFER_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_REMARK, IFDATE, INSUSER, INSDATE, UPDUSER, UPDDATE, CUD_DIV, DATA_DIV,
MES_KEY, DELETE_GUBUN, MES_SEQ ) VALUES ( #{ifno_if}, '01', '000', #{condate}, ' ', ' ', #{itemcode}, 'ZZ99', '001',
#{qty}, #{qty}, 0, ' ', ' ', ' ', ' ', ' ', 1,
#{lineno}, '001', 1, #{wccode}, #{itemcode}, ' ', 1, 1, ' ', ' ',
'N', 'N', ' ', ' ', 'ZZ99', TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MI'), ' ', ' ', 'D', 'SCM',
#{mes_key}, 'A', 1 )

INSERT INTO T_MM_Work_Input_IF ( IFNO, GUBUN, BRANCH, CONDATE, MWNO, MWSUBNO, MWSUBNO2, ITEMCODE, MANCODE, TWORK, CHILDCODE,
QTYPER, LOSS, LOTNO, REMARK, RCGUBUN, INQTY, WCCODE, MPSITEM, QTY, PCODE, ERP_TRANSFER_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_REMARK, IFDATE, INSUSER,
INSDATE, UPDUSER, UPDDATE, CUD_DIV, DATA_DIV, MES_KEY, DELETE_GUBUN, MES_SEQ, MES_SEQ1
) VALUES ( #{ifno_real_if}, '01', '000', #{condate}, ' ', ' ', ' ', #{itemcode}, 'ZZ99', '001', #{childcode},
#{qtyper}, 0, ' ', ' ', 0, #{inqty}, #{wccode}, #{itemcode}, #{qty}, ' ', 'N', 'N', ' ', ' ', 'ZZ99',
TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MI'), ' ', ' ', 'D', 'SCM', #{mes_key}, 'A', 1, 1 )

INSERT INTO T_ST_EXCEPTENTERSUB_IF ( IFNO, GUBUN, BRANCH, CONDATE, EENO, EESUBNO, ITEMCODE, ROOMCODE,
QTY, LOTNO, TREASON, REMARK, ERNO, ERSUBNO, ITEMCODE2, PCODE, ERP_TRANSFER_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_REMARK, IFDATE, INSUSER,
INSDATE, UPDUSER, UPDDATE, CUD_DIV, DATA_DIV, MES_KEY, DELETE_GUBUN, MES_SEQ, BQTY ) VALUES ( #{ifno_if}, '01', '000', #{condate}, ' ', ' ', #{itemcode}, #{roomcode},
#{qty}, ' ', '005', ' ', ' ', ' ', ' ', ' ', 'N', 'N', ' ', ' ', 'ZZ99',
TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MI'), ' ', ' ', 'I', 'SCM', #{mes_key}, ' ', 1, 0 )

INSERT INTO T_ST_EXCEPTENTERSUB_IF ( IFNO, GUBUN, BRANCH, CONDATE, EENO, EESUBNO, ITEMCODE, ROOMCODE,
QTY, LOTNO, TREASON, REMARK, ERNO, ERSUBNO, ITEMCODE2, PCODE, ERP_TRANSFER_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_REMARK, IFDATE, INSUSER,
INSDATE, UPDUSER, UPDDATE, CUD_DIV, DATA_DIV, MES_KEY, DELETE_GUBUN, MES_SEQ, BQTY ) VALUES ( #{ifno_if}, '01', '000', #{condate}, ' ', ' ', #{itemcode}, #{roomcode},
#{qty}, ' ', '005', ' ', ' ', ' ', ' ', ' ', 'N', 'N', ' ', ' ', 'ZZ99',
TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MI'), ' ', ' ', 'D', 'SCM', #{mes_key}, ' ', 1, 0 )

INSERT INTO T_ST_ExceptDeliverysub_IF ( IFNO, GUBUN, BRANCH, CONDATE, EDNO, EDSUBNO, ITEMCODE, MANCODE,
QTY,LOTNO, TREASON, REMARK, PACKING, RQTY,BQTY,SAUP,ROOMCODE, ERNO,ERSUBNO,BUCODE,GMAKE,PCODE,ITEMCODE2,
ERP_TRANSFER_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_REMARK, IFDATE, INSUSER, INSDATE, UPDUSER, UPDDATE, CUD_DIV, DATA_DIV,
MES_KEY, DELETE_GUBUN, MES_SEQ ) VALUES ( #{ifno_if}, '01', '000', #{condate}, ' ', ' ', #{itemcode}, 'ZZ99',
#{qty}, ' ', '005', ' ', ' ', 0, 0, ' ', 'M001', ' ', ' ', ' ', 0, ' ', ' ',
'N', 'N', ' ', ' ', 'ZZ99', TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MI'), ' ', ' ', 'I', 'SCM',
#{mes_key}, ' ', 1 )

INSERT INTO T_ST_ExceptDeliverysub_IF ( IFNO, GUBUN, BRANCH, CONDATE, EDNO, EDSUBNO, ITEMCODE, MANCODE,
QTY,LOTNO, TREASON, REMARK, PACKING, RQTY,BQTY,SAUP,ROOMCODE, ERNO,ERSUBNO,BUCODE,GMAKE,PCODE,ITEMCODE2,
ERP_TRANSFER_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_REMARK, IFDATE, INSUSER, INSDATE, UPDUSER, UPDDATE, CUD_DIV, DATA_DIV,
MES_KEY, DELETE_GUBUN, MES_SEQ ) VALUES ( #{ifno_if}, '01', '000', #{condate}, ' ', ' ', #{itemcode}, 'ZZ99',
#{qty}, ' ', '005', ' ', ' ', 0, 0, ' ', 'M001', ' ', ' ', ' ', 0, ' ', ' ',
'N', 'N', ' ', ' ', 'ZZ99', TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MI'), ' ', ' ', 'D', 'SCM',
#{mes_key}, 'A', 1 )

INSERT INTO T_ST_Movesub_IF ( IFNO, GUBUN, SMNO, SMSUBNO, MANCODE, CONDATE, OUTROOM, OUTBUCODE, ITEMCODE, QTY, GQTY, BQTY, TESTATE, INROOM, INBUCODE, TREASON, LOTNO, REMARK, CF, CONTENTS,
EFLAG, BRANCH, PACKING, OUTBRANCH, SAUP, OUTSAUP, UNITPRICE, SCNO, SCSUBNO,
ERP_TRANSFER_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_REMARK, IFDATE, INSUSER, INSDATE, UPDUSER, UPDDATE, CUD_DIV, DATA_DIV,
MES_KEY, DELETE_GUBUN, MES_SEQ, MES_SEQ1 ) VALUES ( #{ifno_if}, '01', ' ', ' ', 'ZZ99', #{condate}, #{outroom}, ' ', #{itemcode}, 0, #{qty}, 0, '001', #{inroom}, ' ', '006', ' ', ' ', 0, ' ',
0, '000', ' ', ' ', ' ', ' ', 0, ' ', ' ',
'N', 'N', ' ', ' ', 'ZZ99', TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MI'), ' ', ' ', 'I', 'SCM',
#{mes_key}, ' ', 1, 0 )

INSERT INTO T_ST_Movesub_IF ( IFNO, GUBUN, SMNO, SMSUBNO, MANCODE, CONDATE, OUTROOM, OUTBUCODE, ITEMCODE, QTY, GQTY, BQTY, TESTATE, INROOM, INBUCODE, TREASON, LOTNO, REMARK, CF, CONTENTS,
EFLAG, BRANCH, PACKING, OUTBRANCH, SAUP, OUTSAUP, UNITPRICE, SCNO, SCSUBNO,
ERP_TRANSFER_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_REMARK, IFDATE, INSUSER, INSDATE, UPDUSER, UPDDATE, CUD_DIV, DATA_DIV,
MES_KEY, DELETE_GUBUN, MES_SEQ, MES_SEQ1 ) VALUES ( #{ifno_if}, '01', ' ', ' ', 'ZZ99', #{condate}, #{outroom}, ' ', #{itemcode}, 0, #{qty}, 0, '001', #{inroom}, ' ', '006', ' ', ' ', 0, ' ',
0, '000', ' ', ' ', ' ', ' ', 0, ' ', ' ',
'N', 'N', ' ', ' ', 'ZZ99', TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MI'), ' ', ' ', 'D', 'SCM',
#{mes_key}, 'A', 1, 0 )

INSERT INTO T_MM_DELIVERYBACKSUB_IF ( IFNO, GUBUN, BRANCH, CONDATE, MBNO, MBSUBNO, ITEMCODE, MANCODE, WCCODE, ROOMCODE,
BQTY, GQTY, TREASON, TESTATE, REMARK, ERP_TRANSFER_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_REMARK, IFDATE,
INSUSER, INSDATE, UPDUSER, UPDDATE, QTY, CUD_DIV, DATA_DIV, MES_KEY, DELETE_GUBUN, MES_SEQ, LOTNO ) VALUES ( #{ifno_if}, '01', '000', #{condate}, ' ', ' ', #{itemcode}, 'ZZ99', #{wccode}, #{roomcode},
0, #{qty}, '002','001',' ', 'N', 'N', ' ', ' ',
'ZZ99', TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MI'), ' ', ' ', #{qty}, 'I', 'SCM', #{mes_key}, ' ', 1, ' ' )

INSERT INTO T_MM_DELIVERYBACKSUB_IF ( IFNO, GUBUN, BRANCH, CONDATE, MBNO, MBSUBNO, ITEMCODE, MANCODE, WCCODE, ROOMCODE,
BQTY, GQTY, TREASON,TESTATE, REMARK, ERP_TRANSFER_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_REMARK, IFDATE,
INSUSER, INSDATE, UPDUSER, UPDDATE, QTY, CUD_DIV, DATA_DIV, MES_KEY, DELETE_GUBUN, MES_SEQ, LOTNO ) VALUES ( #{ifno_if}, '01', '000', #{condate}, ' ', ' ', #{itemcode}, 'ZZ99', #{wccode}, #{roomcode},
0, #{qty}, '002', '001',' ', 'N', 'N', ' ', ' ',
'ZZ99', TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MI'), ' ', ' ', #{qty}, 'D', 'SCM', #{mes_key}, 'A', 1, ' ' )

INSERT INTO T_PM_ENTERbackSUB_IF ( IFNO, GUBUN, BRANCH, CONDATE, PBNO, PBSUBNO, ITEMCODE, MANCODE, CUSTCODE, ROOMCODE,
BQTY, GQTY, UNITPRICE, AMOUNT, REMARK,
ERP_TRANSFER_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_REMARK, INSUSER, INSDATE, UPDUSER, UPDDATE, CUD_DIV, DATA_DIV,
MES_KEY, DELETE_GUBUN, MES_SEQ ) VALUES ( #{ifno_if}, '01', '000', #{condate}, ' ', ' ', #{itemcode}, 'SCMPDA', '0001', 'M001',
0, #{qty}, '757', 0, ' ',
'N', 'N', ' ', 'SCMPDA', TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MI'), ' ', ' ', 'I', 'SCM',
#{mes_key}, ' ', 1 )

INSERT INTO T_PM_ENTERbackSUB_IF ( IFNO, GUBUN, BRANCH, CONDATE, PBNO, PBSUBNO, ITEMCODE, MANCODE, CUSTCODE, ROOMCODE,
BQTY, GQTY, UNITPRICE, AMOUNT, REMARK,
ERP_TRANSFER_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_REMARK, INSUSER, INSDATE, UPDUSER, UPDDATE, CUD_DIV, DATA_DIV,
MES_KEY, DELETE_GUBUN, MES_SEQ ) VALUES ( #{ifno_if}, '01', '000', #{condate}, ' ', ' ', #{itemcode}, 'SCMPDA', '0001', 'M001',
0, #{qty}, '757', 0, ' ',
'N', 'N', ' ', 'SCMPDA', TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MI'), ' ', ' ', 'D', 'SCM',
#{mes_key}, ' ', 1 )
mapper.select: SELECT MAX(IFNO) FROM T_SM_DELIVERYSUB_SCM_IF WHERE ifno LIKE '%${date}%'
SELECT MAX(IFNO) FROM T_SM_DELIVERYBACKSUB_IF WHERE ifno LIKE '%${date}%'
SELECT MAX(IFNO) FROM T_ST_CHANGESUB WHERE ifno LIKE '%${date}%'
SELECT MAX(IFNO) FROM T_MM_CHANGESUB WHERE ifno LIKE '%${date}%'
SELECT MAX(IFNO) FROM T_MM_ENTERSUB_IF WHERE ifno LIKE '%${date}%'
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO T_SM_DELIVERYSUB_SCM_IF ( IFNO, GUBUN, BRANCH, CONDATE, SDNO, SDSUBNO, MANCODE, CUSTCODE, GMONEY, ITEMCODE, QTY, SRNO, SRSUBNO, UNITPRICE, AMOUNT, REMARK, GORDER, GSELLTYPE, GSALE, LOTNO, ROOMCODE, ORDERIDX, PITEMCODE, ERP_TRANSFER_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_REMARK, IFDATE, INSUSER, INSDATE, UPDUSER, UPDDATE, CUD_DIV, DATA_DIV, MES_KEY, DELETE_GUBUN, MES_SEQ, GDELIVERY, DELCUSTCODE, DELDATE, REQDATE ) VALUES ( #{ifno_if}, '01', '000', #{condate}, ' ', ' ', 'ZZ99', #{cucode}, '002', #{itemcode},
#{qty}, ' ', ' ', '0', 0,
#{invoiceno} ,CASE WHEN #{cucode} = '0012' THEN '003' ELSE '001' END,'001','001',' ', --4
#{roomcode}, 0, #{itemcode}, 'N', 'N', ' ', ' ', 'ZZ99', TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MI'), ' ',
' ', 'I', 'SCM', #{mes_key}, ' ', 1, '003', '001', TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') )
INSERT INTO T_SM_DELIVERYSUB_SCM_IF (IFNO,MES_KEY, MES_SEQ, DATA_DIV, CUD_DIV, DELETE_GUBUN ) VALUES ( 'DE' || SUBSTR(#{meskey}, 3),#{meskey},'1','SCM','D','A')

INSERT INTO T_SM_DELIVERYBACKSUB_IF ( IFNO, GUBUN, BRANCH, CONDATE, SBNO, SBSUBNO, ITEMCODE, MANCODE, CUSTCODE, QTY,
UNITPRICE, REMARK, BRNO, BRSUBNO, GFREE, ROOMCODE, ITEMACNT, SDNO, SDSUBNO, ORDERIDX,
TREASON, PCODE, ERP_TRANSFER_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_REMARK, IFDATE, INSUSER, INSDATE, UPDUSER, UPDDATE,
CUD_DIV, DATA_DIV, MES_KEY, DELETE_GUBUN, MES_SEQ, LOTNO ) VALUES ( #{ifno_if}, '01', '000', #{condate}, ' ', ' ', #{itemcode}, 'ZZ99', '0001', #{qty},
999, ' ', ' ', ' ', 0, 'M001', ' ', ' ', ' ', 0,
'001', #{itemcode}, 'N', 'N', ' ', ' ', 'ZZ99', TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MI'), ' ',
' ', 'I', 'SCM', #{mes_key}, ' ', 1, ' ' )

INSERT INTO T_SM_DELIVERYBACKSUB_IF ( IFNO, GUBUN, BRANCH, CONDATE, SBNO, SBSUBNO, ITEMCODE, MANCODE, CUSTCODE, QTY,
UNITPRICE, REMARK, BRNO, BRSUBNO, GFREE, ROOMCODE, ITEMACNT, SDNO, SDSUBNO, ORDERIDX,
TREASON, PCODE, ERP_TRANSFER_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_REMARK, IFDATE, INSUSER, INSDATE, UPDUSER, UPDDATE,
CUD_DIV, DATA_DIV, MES_KEY, DELETE_GUBUN, MES_SEQ, LOTNO ) VALUES ( #{ifno_if}, '01', '000', #{condate}, ' ', ' ', #{itemcode}, 'ZZ99', '0001', #{qty},
999, ' ', ' ', ' ', 0, 'M001', ' ', ' ', ' ', 0,
'001', #{itemcode}, 'N', 'N', ' ', ' ', 'ZZ99', TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MI'), ' ',
' ', 'D', 'SCM', #{mes_key}, ' ', 1, ' ' )

INSERT INTO T_SM_DELIVERYBACKSUB_IF ( IFNO, GUBUN, BRANCH, CONDATE, SBNO, SBSUBNO, ITEMCODE, MANCODE, CUSTCODE, QTY,
UNITPRICE, REMARK, BRNO, BRSUBNO, GFREE, ROOMCODE, ITEMACNT, SDNO, SDSUBNO, ORDERIDX,
TREASON, PCODE, ERP_TRANSFER_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_REMARK, IFDATE, INSUSER, INSDATE, UPDUSER, UPDDATE,
CUD_DIV, DATA_DIV, MES_KEY, DELETE_GUBUN, MES_SEQ, LOTNO, GORDER ) VALUES ( #{ifno_if}, '01', '000', #{condate}, ' ', ' ', #{itemcode}, 'ZZ99', '0001', #{qty},
999, ' ', ' ', ' ', 0, 'M001', ' ', ' ', ' ', 0,
'001', #{itemcode}, 'N', 'N', ' ', ' ', 'ZZ99', TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MI'), ' ',
' ', 'D', 'SCM', #{mes_key}, 'A', 1, ' ', '001' )

INSERT INTO T_ST_CHANGESUB ( GUBUN, CONDATE, ROOMCODE, ITEMCODE, LOTNO, BUCODE, MANCODE, TESTATE, GSTOCK,
BSTOCK, STOCK, GQTY, BQTY, QTY, REMARK, GMAKE, BRANCH, PACKING, SAUP,
CMB_ITEMTYPE, TINSPECT, RGQTY, RBQTY ) VALUES ( '01', #{condate},#{roomcode}, #{itemcode}, ' ', ' ', 'ZZ99', '001', #{qty},
0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 'WMS - ', '0', '000', ' ', ' ',
' ', '001', 0, 0 )

INSERT INTO T_ST_CHANGESUB ( GUBUN, CONDATE, ROOMCODE, ITEMCODE, LOTNO, BUCODE, MANCODE, TESTATE, GSTOCK,
BSTOCK, STOCK, GQTY, BQTY, QTY, REMARK, GMAKE, BRANCH, PACKING, SAUP,
CMB_ITEMTYPE, TINSPECT, RGQTY, RBQTY ) VALUES ( '01', #{condate},#{roomcode}, #{itemcode}, ' ', ' ', 'ZZ99', '001', #{qty},
#{bqty}, 0, 0, 0, 0, 'WMS - ', '0', '000', ' ', ' ',
' ', '001', 0, 0 )
INSERT INTO T_MM_CHANGE ( GUBUN, CONDATE, WCCODE, MANCODE, INUSER, INDATE, BRANCH ) VALUES ( '01', #{condate}, #{roomcode}, 'ZZ99', 'ZZ99', TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MI'), '000' )
INSERT INTO T_ST_CHANGE ( GUBUN, CONDATE, ROOMCODE, MANCODE, INUSER, INDATE, BRANCH ) VALUES ( '01', #{condate}, #{roomcode}, 'ZZ99', 'ZZ99', TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MI'), '000' )

INSERT INTO T_MM_CHANGESUB ( GUBUN, CONDATE, WCCODE, ITEMCODE, LOTNO, MANCODE, TESTATE, GSTOCK,
BSTOCK, STOCK, GQTY, BQTY, QTY, REMARK, BRANCH,
WGQTY, WBQTY ) VALUES ( '01', #{condate} ,#{roomcode}, #{itemcode}, ' ', 'ZZ99', '001', #{qty},
#{bqty}, 0, 0, 0, 0, 'WMS - ', '000',
0, 0 )

INSERT INTO T_ST_CHANGESUB_IF ( IFNO, GUBUN, CONDATE, ROOMCODE, ITEMCODE, LOTNO, BUCODE, MANCODE, TESTATE, GSTOCK,
BSTOCK, STOCK, GQTY, BQTY, QTY, REMARK, GMAKE, BRANCH, PACKING, SAUP,
CMB_ITEMTYPE, TINSPECT, RGQTY, RBQTY, ERP_TRANSFER_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_REMARK, IFDATE, INSUSER, INSDATE,
UPDUSER, UPDDATE, CUD_DIV, DATA_DIV, MES_KEY, DELETE_GUBUN, MES_SEQ, UPDATE_GUBUN ) VALUES ( #{ifno_if}, '01', #{condate}, #{roomcode}, #{itemcode}, ' ', ' ', 'ZZ99', '001', #{qty},
0, #{qty}, 0, 0, #{qty}, 'WMS - ', '0', '000', ' ', ' ',
' ', '001', #{qty}, 0, 'N', 'N', ' ', ' ', 'ZZ99', TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MI'),
' ', ' ', 'D', 'SCM', #{mes_key}, 'A', '1', ' ' )

INSERT INTO T_MM_ENTERSUB_IF ( IFNO, GUBUN, BRANCH, CONDATE, MENO, MESUBNO, ITEMCODE, WCCODE, MANCODE, ROOMCODE, GTEST, QTY, REMARK, ERP_TRANSFER_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_REMARK, INSUSER, INSDATE, UPDUSER, UPDDATE, MWNO, MWSUBNO, MONO, MOSUBNO, CUD_DIV, DATA_DIV, MES_KEY, DELETE_GUBUN, MES_SEQ, MAKEQTY, GQTY ) VALUES ( #{ifno_if}, '01', '000', #{condate}, ' ', ' ', #{itemcode}, #{wccode}, 'ZZ99', #{roomcode}, 1, #{qty}, ' ', 'N', 'N', ' ', 'ZZ99', TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MI'), ' ', ' ', ' ', ' ', ' ', ' ', 'I', 'SCM', #{mes_key}, ' ', 1, #{qty}, 0 )

INSERT INTO T_MM_ENTERSUB_IF ( IFNO, GUBUN, BRANCH, CONDATE, MENO, MESUBNO, ITEMCODE, WCCODE, MANCODE, ROOMCODE, GTEST, QTY, REMARK, ERP_TRANSFER_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_REMARK, INSUSER, INSDATE, UPDUSER, UPDDATE, MWNO, MWSUBNO, MONO, MOSUBNO, CUD_DIV, DATA_DIV, MES_KEY, DELETE_GUBUN, MES_SEQ, MAKEQTY, GQTY ) VALUES ( #{ifno_if}, '01', '000', #{condate}, ' ', ' ', #{itemcode}, #{wccode}, 'ZZ99', #{roomcode}, 1, #{qty}, ' ', 'N', 'N', ' ', 'ZZ99', TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MI'), ' ', ' ', ' ', ' ', ' ', ' ', 'D', 'SCM', #{mes_key}, ' ', 1, #{qty}, 0 )

INSERT INTO T_ST_Movesub_IF ( IFNO, GUBUN, SMNO, SMSUBNO, MANCODE, CONDATE, OUTROOM, OUTBUCODE, ITEMCODE, QTY, GQTY, BQTY, TESTATE, INROOM, INBUCODE, TREASON, LOTNO, REMARK, CF, CONTENTS,
EFLAG, BRANCH, PACKING, OUTBRANCH, SAUP, OUTSAUP, UNITPRICE, SCNO, SCSUBNO,
ERP_TRANSFER_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_REMARK, IFDATE, INSUSER, INSDATE, UPDUSER, UPDDATE, CUD_DIV, DATA_DIV,
MES_KEY, DELETE_GUBUN, MES_SEQ, MES_SEQ1 ) VALUES ( #{ifno_if}, '01', ' ', ' ', 'ZZ99', #{condate}, #{outroom}, ' ', #{itemcode}, 0, #{qty}, 0, '001', #{inroom}, ' ', '006', ' ', ' ', 0, ' ',
0, '000', ' ', ' ', ' ', ' ', 0, ' ', ' ',
'N', 'N', ' ', ' ', 'ZZ99', TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MI'), ' ', ' ', 'I', 'SCM',
#{mes_key}, ' ', 1, 0 )

INSERT INTO T_ST_Movesub_IF ( IFNO, GUBUN, SMNO, SMSUBNO, MANCODE, CONDATE, OUTROOM, OUTBUCODE, ITEMCODE, QTY, GQTY, BQTY, TESTATE, INROOM, INBUCODE, TREASON, LOTNO, REMARK, CF, CONTENTS,
EFLAG, BRANCH, PACKING, OUTBRANCH, SAUP, OUTSAUP, UNITPRICE, SCNO, SCSUBNO,
ERP_TRANSFER_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_REMARK, IFDATE, INSUSER, INSDATE, UPDUSER, UPDDATE, CUD_DIV, DATA_DIV,
MES_KEY, DELETE_GUBUN, MES_SEQ, MES_SEQ1 ) VALUES ( #{ifno_if}, '01', ' ', ' ', 'ZZ99', #{condate}, #{outroom}, ' ', #{itemcode}, 0, #{qty}, 0, '001', #{inroom}, ' ', '006', ' ', ' ', 0, ' ',
0, '000', ' ', ' ', ' ', ' ', 0, ' ', ' ',
'N', 'N', ' ', ' ', 'ZZ99', TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MI'), ' ', ' ', 'D', 'SCM',
#{mes_key}, 'A', 1, 0 )
mapper.update: update T_WMS_OUTBOUND set intf_yn = 'N', ifno = '', mes_key = '', mes_seq = '', intf_ymdhms_d = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') where iid = #{iid}
update T_WMS_SEMIWORK set intf_yn = 'Y', ifno = #{ifno_if}, mes_key = #{mes_key}, intf_ymdhms = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') where itemcode = #{itemcode} and sdate = #{date}

update T_WMS_SEMIWORK set intf_yn = 'N', ifno = '', mes_key = '', mes_seq = '', wms_seq = '', wms_seq1 = '', intf_ymdhms = '', intf_ymdhms_d = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') where itemcode = #{itemcode} and sdate = #{sdate}
mapper.select: select max(mes_key) from t_st_changesub_if where condate= #{condate} and itemcode = #{itemcode} and cud_div = 'I' and insuser = 'ZZ99'
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO T_PM_NON_ARRIVALSUB_IF ( IFNO, GUBUN, BRANCH, CONDATE, CFNO, CFSUBNO, MANCODE, BUCODE, CUSTCODE,
GORDER, GSALE, GPAY, GMONEY, EXRATE, INPUTDATE,ITEMCODE,QTY, UNITPRICE,WONAMT, VATAMT,
TOTAMT, COSTAMT, REMARK, ORDERIDX, NOINVOICE, BRNO, BRSUBNO, ERP_TRANSFER_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_REMARK, INSUSER,
INSDATE, UPDUSER, UPDDATE, CUD_DIV, DATA_DIV, MES_KEY, DELETE_GUBUN, MES_SEQ, PENO, PESUBNO ) SELECT 'D' || SUBSTR(A.IFNO, 2) AS IFNO, '01', '000', A.CONDATE, ' ', ' ', ' ', ' ', ' ',
' ', ' ', ' ', ' ', 0, ' ', A.ITEMCODE, A.QTY, 0, 0, 0,
0, 0, ' ', 0, A.NOINVOICE, ' ', ' ', 'N', 'N', ' ', 'ZZ99',
TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MI') AS INSDATE, ' ', ' ', 'D', 'SCM', A.IFNO AS MES_KEY, 'A', '1', ' ', ' ' FROM T_PM_NON_ARRIVALSUB_IF A WHERE A.NOINVOICE = #{invoice_no} AND A.CUD_DIV = 'I' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM T_PM_NON_ARRIVALSUB_IF d WHERE d.IFNO = ('D' || SUBSTR(A.IFNO, 2)) )
INSERT INTO T_MM_WORKSUB_IF(IFNO,MES_KEY,MES_SEQ,DATA_DIV,CUD_DIV,DELETE_GUBUN) VALUES(#{ifno_if},#{meskey},'1','SCM','D','A')
INSERT INTO T_MM_Work_Input_IF(IFNO,MES_KEY,MES_SEQ,DATA_DIV,CUD_DIV,DELETE_GUBUN) VALUES(#{ifno_if},#{meskey},'1','SCM','D','A')
INSERT INTO T_MM_ENTERSUB_IF(IFNO,MES_KEY,MES_SEQ,DATA_DIV,CUD_DIV,DELETE_GUBUN) VALUES(#{ifno_if},#{meskey},'1','SCM','D','A')
mapper.select: SELECT 'D' || SUBSTR(ifno, 2) AS ifno, mes_key as mes_key FROM t_pm_non_arrivalsub_if a WHERE condate = #{condate} AND noinvoice = #{invoice_no} and cud_div = 'I' and not exists ( select 1 from t_pm_non_arrivalsub_if b where b.mes_key = a.mes_key and b.cud_div = 'D' ) order by mes_key
mapper.insert: insert into T_QC_BACKTESTSUB_IF ( IFNO, MES_KEY, MES_SEQ, DATA_DIV, CUD_DIV, DELETE_GUBUN, GUBUN, BRANCH, CONDATE, BTNO, BTSUBNO, ITEMCODE, MANCODE, CUSTCODE, SBNO, BRSUBNO, GQTY, BQTY, QTY, LOTNO, REMARK, ERP_RESULT_REMARK, IFDATE, INSUSER, INSDATE, UPDUSER, UPDDATE) select #{ifno}, #{mes_key}, 1, 'SCM', 'D', 'A', GUBUN, BRANCH, CONDATE, BTNO, BTSUBNO, ITEMCODE, MANCODE, CUSTCODE, SBNO, BRSUBNO, GQTY, BQTY, QTY, LOTNO, REMARK, ERP_RESULT_REMARK, IFDATE, INSUSER, INSDATE, UPDUSER, UPDDATE from T_QC_BACKTESTSUB_IF where mes_key = #{mes_key}

insert into T_QC_BACKTEST_POORINFO_IF ( IFNO, MES_KEY, MES_SEQ, DATA_DIV, CUD_DIV, DELETE_GUBUN, GUBUN, BRANCH, CONDATE, BTNO, BTSUBNO, BTSUBNO3, ITEMCODE, CUSTCODE, AQTY, QTY, GQTY,BQTY, TPOORTYPE, DECISION, TPOORREASON, REMARK, BRNO, BRSUBNO, ERP_RESULT_REMARK, IFDATE, INSUSER, INSDATE, UPDUSER, UPDDATE ) select #{ifno}, #{mes_key}, 1, 'SCM', 'D', 'A', GUBUN, BRANCH, CONDATE, BTNO, BTSUBNO, BTSUBNO3, ITEMCODE, CUSTCODE, AQTY, QTY, GQTY,BQTY, TPOORTYPE, DECISION, TPOORREASON, REMARK, BRNO, BRSUBNO, ERP_RESULT_REMARK, IFDATE, INSUSER, INSDATE, UPDUSER, UPDDATE from T_QC_BACKTEST_POORINFO_IF where mes_key = #{mes_key}

insert into T_MM_DELIVERYTESTSUB_if ( IFNO, MES_KEY, MES_SEQ, DATA_DIV, CUD_DIV, DELETE_GUBUN, GUBUN, BRANCH, CONDATE, DTNO, DTSUBNO, ITEMCODE, MANCODE, ROOMCODE, LOTNO, QTY, REMARK, DECISION, SMNO, SMSUBNO, GQTY, BQTY, ERP_RESULT_REMARK, IFDATE, INSUSER, INSDATE, UPDUSER, UPDDATE) select #{ifno}, #{mes_key}, 1, 'SCM', 'D', 'A', GUBUN, BRANCH, CONDATE, DTNO, DTSUBNO, ITEMCODE, MANCODE, ROOMCODE, LOTNO, QTY, REMARK, DECISION, SMNO, SMSUBNO, GQTY, BQTY, ERP_RESULT_REMARK, IFDATE, INSUSER, INSDATE, UPDUSER, UPDDATE from T_MM_DELIVERYTESTSUB_if where mes_key = #{mes_key}

insert into T_ST_Destroysub_IF ( IFNO, MES_KEY, MES_SEQ, DATA_DIV, CUD_DIV, DELETE_GUBUN, GUBUN, SDNO, SDSUBNO, MANCODE, BUCODE, CONDATE, DRNO, DRSUBNO, ITEMCODE, LOTNO, ROOMCODE, QTY, TREASON, GMAKE, REMARK, BRANCH, BQTY, ERP_RESULT_REMARK, IFDATE, INSUSER, INSDATE, UPDUSER, UPDDATE) select #{ifno}, #{mes_key}, 1, 'SCM', 'D', 'A', GUBUN, SDNO, SDSUBNO, MANCODE, BUCODE, CONDATE, DRNO, DRSUBNO, ITEMCODE, LOTNO, ROOMCODE, QTY, TREASON, GMAKE, REMARK, BRANCH, BQTY, ERP_RESULT_REMARK, IFDATE, INSUSER, INSDATE, UPDUSER, UPDDATE from T_ST_Destroysub_IF where mes_key = #{mes_key}
mapper.update: MERGE INTO T_ST_CHANGESUB t USING ( WITH BASE_STOCK AS ( -- 101 기초재고 SELECT branch, gubun, roomcode, itemcode, gQty AS inqty, bQty AS binqty, 0 AS outqty, 0 AS boutqty FROM T_ST_Closesub WHERE gubun = #{gubun} AND chmonth2 = #{baseMonth} UNION ALL -- 102 입고 SELECT branch, gubun, roomcode, itemcode, qty, bqty, 0, 0 FROM T_PM_Entersub WHERE gubun = #{gubun} AND condate BETWEEN #{dateFrom} AND #{dateTo} UNION ALL -- 103 입고반품 SELECT branch, gubun, roomcode, itemcode, -1*gqty, -1*bqty, 0, 0 FROM T_PM_EnterBacksub WHERE gubun = #{gubun} AND condate BETWEEN #{dateFrom} AND #{dateTo} UNION ALL -- 104 생산입고 SELECT branch, gubun, roomcode, itemcode, gqty, bqty, 0, 0 FROM T_MM_EnterSub WHERE gubun = #{gubun} AND condate BETWEEN #{dateFrom} AND #{dateTo} UNION ALL -- 105 생산입고취소 SELECT branch, gubun, roomcode, itemcode, -1*gqty, -1*bqty, 0, 0 FROM T_MM_EnterBackSub WHERE gubun = #{gubun} AND condate BETWEEN #{dateFrom} AND #{dateTo} UNION ALL -- 106 재공->창고 입고 SELECT branch, gubun, roomcode, itemcode, gqty, bqty, 0, 0 FROM T_MM_MoveWIPtoRoomsub WHERE gubun = #{gubun} AND condate BETWEEN #{dateFrom} AND #{dateTo} UNION ALL -- 107 예외입고 SELECT branch, gubun, roomcode, itemcode, qty, 0, 0, 0 FROM T_ST_ExceptEntersub WHERE gubun = #{gubun} AND condate BETWEEN #{dateFrom} AND #{dateTo} UNION ALL -- 108 출하시험 SELECT branch, gubun, roomcode, itemcode, -1*qty, qty, 0, 0 FROM T_MM_DeliverytestSub WHERE gubun = #{gubun} AND condate BETWEEN #{dateFrom} AND #{dateTo} UNION ALL -- 108 무상출고취소(입고) SELECT a.branch, a.gubun, a.roomcode, a.itemcode, a.gqty, a.bqty, 0, 0 FROM T_MM_OUTREQUEST_FREE_BACKSUB a LEFT JOIN T_MM_OUTREQUEST_FREE_BACK b ON a.mbno = b.mbno WHERE a.gubun = #{gubun} AND a.condate BETWEEN #{dateFrom} AND #{dateTo} UNION ALL -- 201 실출고 SELECT branch, gubun, roomcode, childcode, 0, 0, qty, 0 FROM T_MM_DeliverySub_Real WHERE gubun = #{gubun} AND condate BETWEEN #{dateFrom} AND #{dateTo} UNION ALL -- 202 출고반품 SELECT branch, gubun, roomcode, itemcode, 0, 0, -1*gqty, -1*bqty FROM T_MM_DeliveryBacksub WHERE gubun = #{gubun} AND condate BETWEEN #{dateFrom} AND #{dateTo} UNION ALL -- 201 출고요청 SELECT branch, gubun, roomcode, childcode, 0, 0, outqty, 0 FROM T_MM_OutRequestsub WHERE gubun = #{gubun} AND condate BETWEEN #{dateFrom} AND #{dateTo} UNION ALL -- 210 무상출고요청 SELECT branch, gubun, roomcode, childcode, 0, 0, outqty, 0 FROM T_MM_OutRequestsub_Free WHERE gubun = #{gubun} AND condate BETWEEN #{dateFrom} AND #{dateTo} UNION ALL -- 203 판매출고 SELECT branch, gubun, roomcode, CASE WHEN itemcode != pitemcode THEN pitemcode ELSE itemcode END, 0, 0, qty, 0 FROM T_SM_DeliverySub WHERE gubun = #{gubun} AND condate BETWEEN #{dateFrom} AND #{dateTo} UNION ALL -- 206 판매반품(입고) SELECT branch, gubun, roomcode, CASE WHEN itemcode != pcode THEN pcode ELSE itemcode END, qty, bqty, 0, 0 FROM T_SM_DeliveryBackSub WHERE gubun = #{gubun} AND condate BETWEEN #{dateFrom} AND #{dateTo} UNION ALL -- 207 예외출고 SELECT branch, gubun, roomcode, CASE WHEN pcode = ' ' THEN itemcode WHEN itemcode != pcode THEN pcode ELSE itemcode END, 0, 0, qty, 0 FROM T_ST_ExceptDeliverySub WHERE gubun = #{gubun} AND condate BETWEEN #{dateFrom} AND #{dateTo} UNION ALL -- 208 폐기 SELECT branch, gubun, roomcode, itemcode, 0, 0, qty, bqty FROM T_ST_DestroySub WHERE gubun = #{gubun} AND condate BETWEEN #{dateFrom} AND #{dateTo} UNION ALL -- 209 상태변경(출고측) SELECT branch, gubun, roomcode, itemcode, 0, 0, gqty, bqty FROM T_ST_ChangeSub WHERE gubun = #{gubun} AND condate BETWEEN #{dateFrom} AND #{dateTo} UNION ALL -- 301 공정 실출고(자재) SELECT branch, gubun, outroom AS roomcode, childcode, 0, 0, qty, 0 FROM T_PM_DeliverySub_Real WHERE gubun = #{gubun} AND branch = #{branch} AND condate BETWEEN #{dateFrom} AND #{dateTo} UNION ALL -- 302 공정반품 SELECT branch, gubun, inroom AS roomcode, itemcode, 0, 0, -1*gqty, -1*bqty FROM t_pm_deliverybacksub WHERE gubun = #{gubun} AND condate BETWEEN #{dateFrom} AND #{dateTo} UNION ALL -- 304 창고이동(입고측) SELECT branch, gubun, inroom AS roomcode, itemcode, gqty, bqty, 0, 0 FROM t_st_movesub WHERE gubun = #{gubun} AND condate BETWEEN #{dateFrom} AND #{dateTo} UNION ALL -- 304 창고이동(출고측) SELECT branch, gubun, outroom AS roomcode, itemcode, 0, 0, gqty, bqty FROM t_st_movesub WHERE gubun = #{gubun} AND condate BETWEEN #{dateFrom} AND #{dateTo} UNION ALL -- 305 상태변경 양->불 SELECT branch, gubun, roomcode, itemcode, 0, -1*qty, -1*qty, 0 FROM T_ST_ConditionChangeSub WHERE gubun = #{gubun} AND condate BETWEEN #{dateFrom} AND #{dateTo} AND AfterYangBul = '001' UNION ALL -- 305 상태변경 불->양 SELECT branch, gubun, roomcode, itemcode, -1*qty, 0, 0, -1*qty FROM T_ST_ConditionChangeSub WHERE gubun = #{gubun} AND condate BETWEEN #{dateFrom} AND #{dateTo} AND AfterYangBul = '002' UNION ALL -- 106 상태변경(생산->창고 입고 간주) SELECT a.branch, a.gubun, a.roomcode, a.itemcode, a.qty, 0, 0, 0 FROM T_MM_ConditionChangeSub a JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.gubun = b.gubun AND a.itemcode = b.itemcode AND b.cmb_itemtype IN ('001','002') WHERE a.gubun = #{gubun} AND a.condate BETWEEN #{dateFrom} AND #{dateTo} AND a.tConditionAft = '001' AND LENGTH(a.ptno) != 0 AND LENGTH(a.roomcode) = 4 ), TOTAL AS ( SELECT itemcode, SUM(inqty) - SUM(outqty) AS gqty, SUM(binqty) - SUM(boutqty) AS bqty FROM BASE_STOCK WHERE gubun = #{gubun} AND branch = #{branch} AND roomcode = #{roomcode} GROUP BY itemcode ) SELECT itemcode, gqty, bqty FROM TOTAL ) s ON ( t.itemcode = s.itemcode AND t.condate = #{dateTo} AND t.roomcode = #{roomcode} ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET t.rgQty = TO_NUMBER(s.gqty), t.rbQty = TO_NUMBER(s.bqty) WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (itemcode, condate, roomcode, rgQty, rbQty, branch, remark, testate, mancode, gubun, ifno) VALUES (s.itemcode, #{dateTo}, #{roomcode}, 0, 0, #{branch}, 'WMS -', '001', 'ZZ99', #{gubun}, '0')

MERGE INTO T_MM_CHANGESUB t USING ( WITH RAW_DATA AS ( -- 101 기초재고 SELECT branch, gubun, wccode, itemcode, gqty AS inqty, bqty AS binqty, 0 AS outqty, 0 AS boutqty FROM T_MM_CloseSub WHERE gubun = #{gubun} AND chmonth2 = #{baseMonth} UNION ALL -- 102 공정실출고(자재투입) SELECT branch, gubun, wccode, childcode AS itemcode, qty AS inqty, 0 AS binqty, 0 AS outqty, 0 AS boutqty FROM T_MM_DeliverySub_Real WHERE gubun = #{gubun} AND condate BETWEEN #{dateFrom} AND #{dateTo} UNION ALL -- 102 출고요청 SELECT branch, gubun, wccode, childcode AS itemcode, outqty AS inqty, 0 AS binqty, 0 AS outqty, 0 AS boutqty FROM T_MM_OutRequestsub WHERE gubun = #{gubun} AND condate BETWEEN #{dateFrom} AND #{dateTo} UNION ALL -- 106 무상출고요청 SELECT branch, gubun, wccode, childcode AS itemcode, outqty AS inqty, 0 AS binqty, 0 AS outqty, 0 AS boutqty FROM T_MM_OutRequestsub_Free WHERE gubun = #{gubun} AND condate BETWEEN #{dateFrom} AND #{dateTo} UNION ALL -- 103 출고반품 SELECT branch, gubun, wccode, itemcode, -1*gqty AS inqty, -1*bqty AS binqty, 0 AS outqty, 0 AS boutqty FROM T_MM_DeliveryBacksub WHERE gubun = #{gubun} AND condate BETWEEN #{dateFrom} AND #{dateTo} UNION ALL -- 107 예외입고 SELECT branch, gubun, wccode, itemcode, qty AS inqty, 0 AS binqty, 0 AS outqty, 0 AS boutqty FROM T_MM_ExceptEntersub WHERE gubun = #{gubun} AND condate BETWEEN #{dateFrom} AND #{dateTo} UNION ALL -- 207 예외출고 SELECT branch, gubun, wccode, itemcode, 0 AS inqty, 0 AS binqty, qty AS outqty, 0 AS boutqty FROM T_MM_ExceptDeliverySub WHERE gubun = #{gubun} AND condate BETWEEN #{dateFrom} AND #{dateTo} UNION ALL -- 104 생산실적 SELECT branch, gubun, wccode, itemcode, gqty AS inqty, bqty AS binqty, 0 AS outqty, 0 AS boutqty FROM T_MM_WorkSub WHERE gubun = #{gubun} AND condate BETWEEN #{dateFrom} AND #{dateTo} UNION ALL -- 105 분해 SELECT branch, gubun, wccode, itemcode, -1*gqtyin AS inqty, -1*bqtyin AS binqty, 0 AS outqty, 0 AS boutqty FROM T_MM_DisAssemble WHERE gubun = #{gubun} AND condate BETWEEN #{dateFrom} AND #{dateTo} UNION ALL -- 201 공정투입(작업지시 자재소요) SELECT a.branch, a.gubun, a.wccode, a.childcode AS itemcode, 0 AS inqty, 0 AS binqty, a.inqty AS outqty, 0 AS boutqty FROM T_MM_Work_Input a LEFT JOIN T_MM_Worksub c ON a.gubun = c.gubun AND a.mwno = c.mwno AND a.mwsubno = c.mwsubno WHERE a.gubun = #{gubun} AND c.condate BETWEEN #{dateFrom} AND #{dateTo} UNION ALL -- 202 생산입고 SELECT branch, gubun, wccode, itemcode, 0 AS inqty, 0 AS binqty, gqty AS outqty, bqty AS boutqty FROM T_MM_Entersub WHERE gubun = #{gubun} AND condate BETWEEN #{dateFrom} AND #{dateTo} UNION ALL -- 203 생산입고취소 SELECT branch, gubun, wccode, itemcode, 0 AS inqty, 0 AS binqty, -1*gqty AS outqty, -1*bqty AS boutqty FROM T_MM_EnterBacksub WHERE gubun = #{gubun} AND condate BETWEEN #{dateFrom} AND #{dateTo} UNION ALL -- 205 분해소요 SELECT branch, gubun, wccode, childcode AS itemcode, 0 AS inqty, 0 AS binqty, -1*gqtyout AS outqty, -1*bqtyout AS boutqty FROM T_MM_DisAssemblesub WHERE gubun = #{gubun} AND condate BETWEEN #{dateFrom} AND #{dateTo} UNION ALL -- 206 상태변경 SELECT branch, gubun, wccode, itemcode, 0 AS inqty, 0 AS binqty, gqty AS outqty, bqty AS boutqty FROM T_MM_Changesub WHERE gubun = #{gubun} AND condate BETWEEN #{dateFrom} AND #{dateTo} UNION ALL -- 207 재공->창고이동(출고측) SELECT branch, gubun, outwc AS wccode, itemcode, 0 AS inqty, 0 AS binqty, gqty AS outqty, bqty AS boutqty FROM T_MM_MoveWIPtoRoomsub WHERE gubun = #{gubun} AND condate BETWEEN #{dateFrom} AND #{dateTo} UNION ALL -- 208 폐기 SELECT branch, gubun, wccode, itemcode, 0 AS inqty, 0 AS binqty, qty AS outqty, bqty AS boutqty FROM T_MM_DestroySub WHERE gubun = #{gubun} AND condate BETWEEN #{dateFrom} AND #{dateTo} UNION ALL -- 209 재작업 SELECT branch, gubun, wccode, childcode AS itemcode, 0 AS inqty, 0 AS binqty, gqtyout AS outqty, bqtyout AS boutqty FROM T_MM_Reworksub WHERE gubun = #{gubun} AND condate BETWEEN #{dateFrom} AND #{dateTo} UNION ALL -- 302 공정검사 SELECT branch, gubun, wccode, itemcode, 0 AS inqty, pqty AS binqty, pqty AS outqty, 0 AS boutqty FROM T_QC_ProcTestsub WHERE gubun = #{gubun} AND condate BETWEEN #{dateFrom} AND #{dateTo} AND mwno = ' ' UNION ALL -- 303 완성검사 SELECT branch, gubun, wccode, mpsitem AS itemcode, 0 AS inqty, pqty AS binqty, pqty AS outqty, 0 AS boutqty FROM T_QC_FinishTest WHERE gubun = #{gubun} AND condate BETWEEN #{dateFrom} AND #{dateTo} UNION ALL -- 304 작업장이동(입고측) SELECT branch, gubun, inwc AS wccode, itemcode, gqty AS inqty, bqty AS binqty, 0 AS outqty, 0 AS boutqty FROM T_MM_MoveSub WHERE gubun = #{gubun} AND condate BETWEEN #{dateFrom} AND #{dateTo} UNION ALL -- 304 작업장이동(출고측) SELECT branch, gubun, outwc AS wccode, itemcode, 0 AS inqty, 0 AS binqty, gqty AS outqty, bqty AS boutqty FROM T_MM_MoveSub WHERE gubun = #{gubun} AND condate BETWEEN #{dateFrom} AND #{dateTo} UNION ALL -- 305 상태변경 양->불 (ptno 없음) SELECT branch, gubun, wccode, itemcode, qty AS inqty, -1*qty AS binqty, 0 AS outqty, 0 AS boutqty FROM T_MM_ConditionChangeSub WHERE gubun = #{gubun} AND condate BETWEEN #{dateFrom} AND #{dateTo} AND tConditionAft = '001' AND LENGTH(ptno) = 0 UNION ALL -- 305 상태변경 불->양 (ptno 없음) SELECT branch, gubun, wccode, itemcode, -1*qty AS inqty, qty AS binqty, 0 AS outqty, 0 AS boutqty FROM T_MM_ConditionChangeSub WHERE gubun = #{gubun} AND condate BETWEEN #{dateFrom} AND #{dateTo} AND tConditionAft = '002' AND LENGTH(ptno) = 0 UNION ALL -- 306 작업완료(toWccode 있음, 출고측) SELECT branch, gubun, wccode, itemcode, 0 AS inqty, 0 AS binqty, gqty AS outqty, 0 AS boutqty FROM T_MM_WorkSub WHERE gubun = #{gubun} AND condate BETWEEN #{dateFrom} AND #{dateTo} AND LENGTH(towccode) = 5 UNION ALL -- 307 작업완료(toWccode 있음, 입고측) SELECT branch, gubun, towccode AS wccode, itemcode, gqty AS inqty, 0 AS binqty, 0 AS outqty, 0 AS boutqty FROM T_MM_WorkSub WHERE gubun = #{gubun} AND condate BETWEEN #{dateFrom} AND #{dateTo} AND LENGTH(towccode) = 5 UNION ALL -- 308 상태변경 양->불 (ptno 있음) SELECT branch, gubun, wccode, itemcode, qty AS inqty, -1*qty AS binqty, 0 AS outqty, 0 AS boutqty FROM T_MM_ConditionChangeSub WHERE gubun = #{gubun} AND condate BETWEEN #{dateFrom} AND #{dateTo} AND tConditionAft = '001' AND LENGTH(ptno) != 0 UNION ALL -- 308 상태변경 불->양 (ptno 있음) SELECT branch, gubun, wccode, itemcode, -1*qty AS inqty, qty AS binqty, 0 AS outqty, 0 AS boutqty FROM T_MM_ConditionChangeSub WHERE gubun = #{gubun} AND condate BETWEEN #{dateFrom} AND #{dateTo} AND tConditionAft = '002' AND LENGTH(ptno) != 0 UNION ALL -- 304 상태변경->창고이동(ptno 있고 roomcode 4자리) SELECT a.branch, a.gubun, a.wccode, a.itemcode, 0 AS inqty, 0 AS binqty, a.qty AS outqty, 0 AS boutqty FROM T_MM_ConditionChangeSub a JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.gubun = b.gubun AND a.itemcode = b.itemcode AND b.cmb_itemtype IN ('001', '002') WHERE a.gubun = #{gubun} AND a.condate BETWEEN #{dateFrom} AND #{dateTo} AND a.tConditionAft = '001' AND LENGTH(a.ptno) != 0 AND LENGTH(a.roomcode) = 4 UNION ALL -- 311 무상출고취소 SELECT a.branch, a.gubun, a.wccode, a.itemcode, 0 AS inqty, 0 AS binqty, a.gqty AS outqty, a.bqty AS boutqty FROM T_MM_OUTREQUEST_FREE_BACKSUB a WHERE a.gubun = #{gubun} AND a.condate BETWEEN #{dateFrom} AND #{dateTo} ), TOTAL AS ( SELECT gubun, branch, itemcode, wccode, SUM(inqty) AS inqty1, SUM(binqty) AS binqty1, SUM(outqty) AS outqty1, SUM(boutqty) AS boutqty1 FROM RAW_DATA GROUP BY gubun, branch, itemcode, wccode ) SELECT itemcode, inqty1 - outqty1 AS jegoqty1, binqty1 - boutqty1 AS bjegoqty1 FROM TOTAL WHERE gubun = #{gubun} AND branch IN (' ', '000') AND wccode = #{wccode} ) s ON ( t.itemcode = s.itemcode AND t.condate = #{dateTo} AND t.WCcode = #{wccode} ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET t.wgQty = s.jegoqty1, t.wbQty = s.bjegoqty1 WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (itemcode, condate, WCcode, wgQty, wbQty, BRANCH, REMARK, TESTATE, MANCODE, GUBUN, IFNO) VALUES (s.itemcode, #{dateTo}, #{wccode}, 0, 0, #{branch}, 'WMS -', '001', 'ZZ99', #{gubun}, '0')
{CALL SP_IF_WMS_ERP_CLOSE_ADJUST(#{condate})}
